theory.canonical_statement: TZP Opera Omnia Volume I (Master Workstation) is represented in the recovered source evidence by the relation \hat{H}_\text{tunnel} = -\frac{\hbar^2}{2m_\text{eff}} abla^2 + V_\text{barrier}(r,\theta,\phi,t).

equation_progression.latex: Formal Statement: In the coupled phonon--magnon system, the total helicity H\_total = H\_acoustic + H\_magnetic is conserved.

Formal Statement: Fields on the compactified dimension decompose as psi(x,y,t) = sum over n of psi\_n(x,t) times exp(i n y/R\_KK), yielding discrete frequencies omega\_n = n c / R\_KK.

dictionary_sections.definition: TZP Opera Omnia Volume I (Master Workstation) is a source-backed TZPID registry entry anchored by the formal relation \hat{H}_\text{tunnel} = -\frac{\hbar^2}{2m_\text{eff}} abla^2 + V_\text{barrier}(r,\theta,\phi,t). The entry records the named mathematical object as it appears in recovered source evidence and prepares it for the locked four-page production layout.
dictionary_sections.contextual_meaning: In context, TZP Opera Omnia Volume I (Master Workstation) is not treated as an isolated label. It is read through the nearby source passage: ies complete the Opera Omnia: the full mathematical language of the theory in canonical statutory form. --- ## Part One: The Trawin Hamiltonian (ID 850) ### The Master Operator $$\hat{H}_\text{Trawin}[\psi, t] = \hat{H}_\text{tunnel} + \hat{H}_\text{ER} + \hat{H}_\text{SC} + \hat{H}_\text{cymatic} + \hat{H}_\text{TZP}$$ This is the apex of the registry — the operator that governs the full dynamics of a system operating at or near the Trawin Zero Point. ### Component 1: Quantum Tunnelling $$\hat{H}_\text{tunnel} = -\frac{\hbar^2}{2m_\text{eff}}\nabla^2 + V_\text{barrier}(r,\theta,\phi,t)$$ This is the standard kinetic-plus-potential Hamiltonian of non-relativistic quantum mechanics, modified by an effective mass $m_\text{eff}$ and a time-dependent potential barrier $V_\text{barrier}$. This keeps the dictionary explanation tied to the mathematical usage that produced the recovered formula.
dictionary_sections.derivable_consequences: The canonical relation supplies the primary production equation, while the support chain \hat{H}_\text{Trawin}[\psi, t] = \hat{H}_\text{tunnel} + \hat{H}_\text{ER} + \hat{H}_\text{SC} + \hat{H}_\text{cymatic} + \hat{H}_\text{TZP}; Formal Statement: In the coupled phonon--magnon system, the total helicity H\_total = H\_acoustic + H\_magnetic is conserved.; Formal Statement: Apply a fluctuating negative charge density ρ\_e(t) = ρ\_0 + ρ\_1\,cos(ω\,t) to a vortex region. The total radial acceleration becomes records adjacent mathematical consequences or compatible constraints. These relations can be used as equation support on the derivation page after author review.
